verses.text: Zedekiah in a uk a kum sawmna, a kha sawm, a ni sawmlenih ni-in Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Egypt kumpipa Faro' lam nga in la, amah leh Egypt gam khempeuh gim a kipiakna ding thu genkhol in

Topa Pasian in hih bangin gen hi, ci-in Egypt kumpipa kiangah gen in: “Gun sungah a om awle lianpi ahi, nang Egypt kumpipa aw, kei pen nangma lang ka hi hi. Nail Gunpi, nangma-a'-in na gen a, nangma bawlsa-in na ngaihsun hi
Na khaguhah sikkawi ka bulh ding a, na gun sunga om ngasa khempeuh nangma tungah ka belhsak ding hi. Tua ciangin nangma tungah a belh ngasa khempeuh tawh Nail gun sung panin nang kong kaikhia ding hi
Nang leh na ngasa khempeuh gamlakah kong paai ding hi. Leilakah na pumpi kiphah ding a, phumlohin hong kikoih ding hi. Ganhingte leh vasate' an dingin nang ka hong pia ding hi

“Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu Egypt mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen Israel mite' muan' leh suan' khat na hi ngei a, ahi zongin nang pen a khauhlo pumpeeng kung khat bang na hi lel hi
Nangma tungah amaute hong kingap uh ciangin nang na kitan a, amaute sunin na puksak hi
Tu-in Topa Pasian in nang kiangah kong genin-ah: Namsau tawh mi kong simsak ding a, na mite leh na ganhingte thatlummang ding uh hi
Egypt gam khempeuh a kinusia gam simtham suak ding a, tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding hi. Nangmah in Nail Gunpi pen keima-a' hi a, keima bawlsa hi, ci na hih manin
nangmah leh Nail Gunpi langah keimah ka pang hi. Egypt gam khempeuh, leilu lam Migdol khuapi panin leitaw lam Siene khuapi, Ethiopia gamgi dong, a kinusia gamkhing ka suaksak ding hi
Na gamsungteng, mihing in ahi a, ganhing in ahi zongin sik nawnlo ding hi. Kum sawmli sung bangmah omlo ding hi

Leitung gam khempeuh lakah Egypt gam pen a gamkhing penin ka bawl ding hi. Kum sawmli sung khuapi sia dang khempeuh sangin a siazaw-in Egypt khuapite ka bawl ding hi. Egypt mite galtai-in ka bawl ding a, gam khempeuh leh minam dang khempeuh kiangah taisakin ka kithehthangsak ding hi
“Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian in hih bangin ka ci hi: Kum sawmli khit ciangin a kithehthangna minamte lak panin Egypt mite ka kaikhawmkik ding a
amaute' pian'-cilna mun Egypt gam khanglam Pathros gamah ka tengsak ding hi. Tua lai-ah kumpi gam ginaloin om ding uh a
kumpi gam khempeuh lakah a ginalo pen suak ding uh a, minam dang kuamah ukzo nawnlo ding uh hi. A ginalo mahmahin bawl ding ka hih manin amau' deih bangin minam dang khat beek tasak zolo ding uh hi

Israel mite in muan' leh suan'in amaute neikik ngei nawnlo ding uh hi. Egypt-te a tuahsiat ciangin a suang khialkha ahih lamtak uh Israel mite in a phawk ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa Pasian ka hihna thu Israel mite in hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi
Zedekiah in a uk a kum sawmnihlesagih kum, a kha masa a ni masa ni-in Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a

“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in Taia khuapi sim hi. A galkapte, nakpi takin hanciamsak lua ahih manin a sam nangawn uh pulhmangin, a liangkote uh a sa nangawn lengkhiamang a, ahi zongin tua bangin amau' gim thamanin kumpipa leh a galkapte in bangmah phattuamna ngahlo uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih bangin thu kong gen hi: Tu-in Taia khuapi a simna hangin Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar tungah Egypt gam ka pia ding hi. Amah in Egypt gam luhin a nate uh sut ding a, galkapte' thaman dingin Egypt-te' neihsa khempeuh puakhiamang ding hi
A galkapte in keima-a' dingin na hong sepsak uh ahih manin, ama hong nasepsak ka thuhna-in ama tungah Egypt gam a pia ka hi hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi

“Hih thu hong tun' ciangin Israel mite a thahat minamin ka bawlkik ding a, mi khempeuh' zakna ding munah nang thu kong gensak ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi.
